health_conditions: rough dry patch on right shoulder (red, peeling)

benefits.description: Chronic dry, rough, reddish peeling patch on right shoulder completely resolved after 9 days
Face skin became oily where it was previously dry; perceived as improvement by wife

side_effects.description: Burning and itching at injection site lasting 36 hours; partially resolved by significantly diluting the solution and splitting into two injection sites and halving the dose

protocol_notes: Used a ready-made blend vial from a supplier containing BPC-157 (8 mg total), TB-500 (10 mg total), and GHK-Cu (50 mg total). Injected subcutaneously into love handles. Initially injected full dose in a single site; eventually switched to splitting dose across 2x 0.3 ml injections at two sites to reduce injection site reaction. Dose was temporarily halved (0.25 mg BPC + 0.3 mg TB + 1.6 mg GHK-Cu) during the reaction troubleshooting period. Tried cetirizine HCl, hydrocortisone cream, fluticasone spray, and massage with minimal effect on injection site reaction.
